name: STMicroelectronics N.V.
description: STMicroelectronics N.V. is a global independent semiconductor company that designs, develops, manufactures, and markets a broad range of products, including discrete and standard commodity components, application-specific integrated circuits, full-custom devices, and semi-custom devices for analog, digital, and mixed-signal applications. The company serves customers across the spectrum of electronics applications with a strong focus on automotive and industrial sectors, where it provides innovative solutions for power management, sensing, and connectivity. STMicroelectronics is a leader in Silicon Carbide (SiC) technology, which is critical for the advancement of electric vehicles and energy-efficient power systems.
